description:
Parent epic: V3 E7: Errors, debugging, and inspection

Source task 7/8 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Add tests for missing agents, running agents, completed requests, interrupted
  requests, failed requests, and redaction.

Epic closure criteria:
- users can answer what happened in a turn without reading logs
- errors are normalized, readable, and safe to display
- debugging output is structured, bounded, and safe by default

comments.text: Added request-summary coverage for missing agents, completed requests with redacted context, pending/running requests, interrupted requests, and failed requests. Normalized string-id debug lookup through Jidoka/Jido registry resolution.
